title: escalation loop on verify fail
purpose: B3.3 defines escalation loop on verify fail for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B3.3` only; siblings under `B3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: When [B2.4](B2.4-verifier-tool-operator-evidence.md) returns `last_verify=failed`, the conductor owns an escalation loop—capture the evidence log, classify failure as test, tool, environment, or design, and decide retry versus refactor task versus H2.
Workers do not self-clear evidence gates; only the conductor may re-spawn a Verifier after a bounded fix or record an H2 blocker with attached evidence paths.
The implement task stays incomplete and `next_action` does not advance past the failing task while `evidence_required` is true and verification has not passed.

Repeated verify failure on the same task card triggers S4 packaging per [B1.5](B1.5-s4-governance-escalation-h2-packaging.md) with evidence paths and journal notes so pursuit cannot churn implement→fail→implement silently.
If classification is ambiguous or recovery exceeds retry policy, pursuit halts at H2 with structured failure context rather than marking the task done or requesting H3 sign-off.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Edge case `B3.3` variant 3: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Edge case `B3.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `B3.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Map `B3.3` to v2.14â€“v2.23 release row in SEC-15-index.md.
Create or extend S0 script if behavior is file-derived.
Add unit test under tests/unit/test_b3_3.py when script exists.
Validate `B3.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `B3.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `B3.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: B3.3 defines escalation loop on verify fail for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system when [b2.4](b2.4-verifier-tool-operator-evidence.md) returns `last_verify=failed`, the conductor owns an escalation loop—capture the evidence log, classify failure as test, tool, environment, or design, and decide retry versus refactor task versus h2, then workers do not self-clear evidence gates; only the conductor may re-spawn a verifier after a bounded fix or record an h2 blocker with attached evidence paths.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

When verify fails, an escalation loop runs: capture log, classify failure (test, tool, environment, design), decide retry vs H2 vs refactor task—without silently marking the implement task complete. The conductor owns the loop; workers do not self-clear evidence gates.

Repeated verify failure on the same task card triggers S4 packaging for H2 with evidence paths attached. This prevents infinite implement→fail→implement churn without journal record.
